module.name: line
module.description: Draws a straight line across a rectangular box. Pick where the line starts and ends (any corner or edge-midpoint of the box), the end-cap shapes (arrow, triangle, dot, circle, diamond, square, bar, …), the line style (solid / dashed / dotted), colour, thickness and box size.
module.aiSpec: Draw a straight LINE across a rectangular box (e.g. a divider, connector or annotation). Inline module — no body. The line runs between a START and an END anchor, each chosen from the box's 8 edge points: corners `tl tr bl br` and edge-midpoints `tc`(top) `bc`(bottom) `lc`(left) `rc`(right). Defaults `lc`→`rc` (a horizontal line through the centre); `tc`→`bc` is vertical; corner→corner is diagonal. Params: `start`/`end` (anchors above); `startshape`/`endshape` (end-cap: none, arrow, arrow-open, triangle, dot, circle, round, square, diamond, bar); `linestyle` (solid | dashed | dotted | dashdot); `color` (blank = theme text colour); `thickness` (px); `width`/`height` (CSS lengths sizing the box). Example: `<!-- @line start: lc, end: rc, endshape: arrow, color: #ef4444 -->`.

param.name: color
param.label: Colour
param.desc: Blank uses the theme text colour.

param.name: height
param.label: Box height
param.desc: CSS length (e.g. 60px, 6em). Gives diagonal/vertical lines room.

snippet.label: Line — arrow
snippet.text: <!-- @line start: lc, end: rc, endshape: arrow -->
snippet.description: A horizontal arrow across the box (left to right).

snippet.label: Line — double-headed diagonal
snippet.text: <!-- @line start: bl, end: tr, startshape: dot, endshape: arrow, linestyle: dashed, color: #3b82f6 -->
snippet.description: A dashed diagonal line with a dot start and arrow end.
